suggestions.desc: Remove unused variable "Activity".
Remove unused variable "ShieldCheck".
Remove unused variable "Zap".
Remove unused variable "DollarSign".
Remove unused import declaration.
Remove unused variable "triggerHistory".

source:
"use client"; import { ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, ShieldX, Eye } from "lucide-react"; import { workerProfile, triggerHistory, earningsHeatmap } from "@/lib/mockData"; const fraudSignals = [ { name: "Location Integrity", weight: 0.25, score: 0.06, detail: "GPS vs accelerometer: consistent. No drift anomaly.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Activity Authenticity", weight: 0.20, score: 0.09, detail: "Activity quality score: 0.78. Pre-trigger: sustained movement.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Claim Frequency", weight: 0.15, score: 0.12, detail: "3 claims / 8 weeks. Zone avg: 2.4. Within 2.5├ù threshold.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Enrollment Timing", weight: 0.10, score: 0.0, detail: "Policy active for 14 months. No adverse selection signal.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Baseline Manipulation", weight: 0.10, score: 0.04, detail: "Earnings growth within 1 SD of zone avg. BWE stable.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Cross-Platform Activity", weight: 0.10, score: 0.0, detail: "Single platform registration. No Swiggy/Zomato crossover detected.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Zone Coordination", weight: 0.05, score: 0.0, detail: "No synchronized claim patterns in HSR-BLR-07.", status: "clean" as const, }, { name: "Historical Anomaly", weight: 0.05, score: 0.02, detail: "Clean history. No prior fraud flags. Anomaly score decayed.", status: "clean" as const, }, ]; const computedFraudScore = fraudSignals.reduce( (sum, s) => sum + s.weight * s.score, 0 ); export default function FraudPage() { // Work probability curve from heatmap const workProbability = earningsHeatmap.map((slot) => ({ slot: slot.slot, probability: Math.min(0.15 + 0.85 * (slot.share / 0.32), 1.0), })); return (
{/* Header */}

Fraud Signal Analysis

8-signal fraud scoring for {workerProfile.name} ┬╖ Most recent event

{/* Summary cards */}

Composite Score

{computedFraudScore.toFixed(3)}

Risk Tier

LOW RISK

Action

Auto-Approve

{/* Signal breakdown */}

Signal Decomposition

FraudScore = ╬ú(Wi ├ù Si) = {computedFraudScore.toFixed(4)}

{fraudSignals.map((signal) => { const contribution = signal.weight * signal.score; const barWidth = Math.max(signal.score * 100, 2); return (
{signal.name} w={signal.weight.toFixed(2)}
contrib: {contribution.toFixed(4)} {signal.score.toFixed(2)}

{signal.detail}

); })}
{/* Work Probability Curve */}

Work Probability Curve (WPC)

P(worker works at time T) ΓÇö derived from 8-week earnings history

payout_multiplier = 0.15 + 0.85 ├ù work_probability(T)

{workProbability.map((wp) => (
{wp.slot}
0.8 ? "rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.5)" : wp.probability > 0.5 ? "rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3)" : "rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.15)", }} />
{(wp.probability * 100).toFixed(0)}% ├ù{(0.15 + 0.85 * wp.probability).toFixed(2)}
))}
{/* Decision tiers reference */}

Decision Tier Reference

Score Range Tier Action
0.00 ΓÇô 0.35 LOW RISK Auto-approve ┬╖ payout formula runs immediately
0.35 ΓÇô 0.60 MEDIUM RISK Zone cluster review
0.60 ΓÇô 0.80 HIGH RISK Fast-track human review (2-hour window)
> 0.80 CRITICAL Fast-track review + compliance flag
MVP rule: No auto-deny. HIGH and CRITICAL scores route to fast-track human review.
); }

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
